title: Crushed ores for Modern Industrialization
description: Resprites the Tin, Silver, Platinum, Lead, Nickel and Uranium crushed ores in Create to fit their Modern Industrialization palettes
body: Resprites the Tin, Silver, Platinum, Lead, Nickel and Uranium crushed ores in Create to fit their Modern Industrialization palettes. Feel free to use it in your modpacks! Inspired by [Mythic Metals - Create: Crushed Resprites](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mm-create-crushedsprites).
